title: Toggle Polygon (Toggle)
text: Toggle Polygon (Toggle) Determines whether the valueChanged trigger is activated when a previously selected polygon is selected for the second time. True or False (default) Toggle = " True | False " Value Description True The field value is set to NULL , and the valueChanged trigger is activated. False The valueChanged trigger is not activated and the field value is unchanged. Example: Setting in ProcScript $fieldproperties(MAP) = "toggle=true" Copy Applies To umap (Map) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
